ABOUT.title: About Me
ABOUT.subtitle: Get to Know Me
ABOUT.aboutMeDesc1: As a Frontend Developer, I build modern and scalable web interfaces using React, TypeScript, and Next.js. I have been working in frontend development for over three years and actively contribute to enterprise-level projects.
ABOUT.aboutMeDesc2: At NTT DATA Business Solutions, I worked on projects focused on logistics, sustainability, and operational management. I contributed to frontend development in enterprise applications such as BSH Milkrun, COSMOS Modernization, the Implika ESG Platform, and systems developed for Daimler Truck.
ABOUT.aboutMeDesc3: I focus on user experience, performance, and sustainable component architecture while developing modern frontend solutions within the React ecosystem.
ABOUT.aboutMeDesc4: You can review my work in the experience section below or explore the applications I have built through my GitHub profile.

projects.daimlerTruck: Mercedes-Benz / Daimler Truck – Enterprise Web Platform
projects.implikaEsg: Implika – ESG Assessment and Reporting Platform

daimlerTruck.desc1: In this enterprise platform developed for Daimler Truck, I worked on the frontend development of a multi-module system covering operational processes such as working hours tracking, reporting, and cost center management.
daimlerTruck.desc2: I contributed to the development of form management, data tables, role-based authorization, and reporting interfaces.
daimlerTruck.desc3: Technologies Used: React, TypeScript, Vite, Mantine UI, Tailwind CSS, React Query, React Hook Form, REST API

implikaEsg.desc1: I worked on the frontend development of this web application that manages environmental, social, and governance (ESG) processes.
implikaEsg.desc2: I contributed to the development of dynamic form structures, question–answer flows, data visualization (chart) components, photo upload features, and reporting modules.
implikaEsg.desc3: Technologies Used: React, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, Material UI, DevExtreme, REST API

bshMilkrun.desc1: The Milkrun project is a web application that digitalizes logistics operations including order management, GPS tracking, and notification systems.
bshMilkrun.desc2: I worked on developing frontend modules related to ramp reservation and shuttle operations.
bshMilkrun.desc3: Technologies Used: React, JavaScript, SCSS, DevExtreme, REST API

cosmosModernization.desc1: This project focuses on modernizing the user interface of a web application that manages employee and technical service processes.
cosmosModernization.desc2: I implemented API integrations and restructured the interfaces to improve the overall user experience.
cosmosModernization.desc3: Technologies Used: HTML, CSS, TypeScript, React, Redux Toolkit, React Hook Form, Material UI, and DevExtreme
